title: Dickies Men's Shirt Long Sleeve Traditional Button Front Uniform Work Shirt 574
description: The Dickies Men's Shirt Long Sleeve Traditional Button Front Uniform Work Shirt 574 is a versatile and durable button-up shirt designed for various occasions including workwear, business attire, and casual outings. Made from a blend of 65% polyester and 35% cotton twill fabric, this shirt features a spread collar, adjustable fit, and breathability, making it suitable for all seasons. With a solid pattern and no graphic print, it offers a classic and timeless look suitable for any decade from the 20s to the 90s. Easy to care for with machine washable instructions, this Dickies shirt is a practical and stylish addition to any man's wardrobe.
